ground_truth: semantic+causal associations (consolidator/LLM-judged); temporal excluded; random negatives for AUC
notes: Embedding-only retrieval (no BM25/graph hybrid); relative ranking is the decision signal.
model file = real model.safetensors/largest weight; dependency footprint measured separately.
torch(GPU build) = 1760MB + CUDA libs 4573MB; CPU-only torch ~200MB. model2vec = numpy(41MB) only.
e5_small_onnx_int8 NOT benchmarked: optimum 2.x / optimum-onnx 0.1.0 / transformers 4.57 import incompatibility in this env.

model2vec_distill_e5small_naive.note: on-the-fly distill with defaults; worse than pre-trained potion

hash_fallback_floor.note: current `greeum mcp serve` default — essentially random
